add.description: Add a file or folder to commit

commit.description: Commit files or folders to git

repositoryPath.description: Local path to which the git repository should be cloned into

pathsToAdd.description: Comma-separated list of paths (absolute or relative to Repository Path) of files or folders to add

key.description: Name of the key to set

value.description: Value of the key to set

mode.description: Append setting rather than set it in the local config

branch.description: The branch to switch to before pushing. If empty or not set, will push current branch.

pathsToAdd.description: Comma-separated list of paths (absolute or relative to Repository Path) of files or folders to commit. If not set will all "added" files and folders be committed.

file.description: The path (absolute or relative to Repository Path) of file or folder to get the history of

targetRepository.description: The URL or path of the repository to push to

reference.description: The reference to show the reflog for (e.g., HEAD, branch name). Leave empty for HEAD.

createBranch.description: Whether to create the branch if it does not exist

startPoint.description: The commit/branch/tag to create the new branch from. If not set, creates from current HEAD.

force.description: Whether to force the branch switch, discarding any local changes

setUpstream.description: Whether to set up tracking to a remote branch when creating a new branch

remoteName.description: The name of the remote to track

sourceRepository.description: The URL or path of the repository to clone

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

branchName.description: The name of the branch to switch to

name.description: The name of the tag to create
